name: Breana
ai_summary: Breana Dedmon has 16 years of experience with children from infants to elementary age and is currently studying psychology, seeking full-time or part-time roles within 10 miles of Gilbert, AZ. She emphasizes a fair conflict resolution process and a lifelong passion for positively influencing children's development.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Brianna and I have worked with the children. Since I was 16 years old with the within all ages from infants to four and five-year-olds and even like Elementary age as well with the our Aftercare programs and I love working with children. I'm very it's like my passion. I am currently going.
 Going to school for psychology. And I really want to get into social work or children psychology. I love the way their brain works and how they express themselves. And it's just so much fun working with kids. It's never a dull moment.
transcripts.q4: I am located in the Gilbert Arizona area and I am willing to travel up to 10 miles or little bit more than that for a preschool Center.
